name: Exposure of Information Through Shell Error Message
description: Command shell error messages expose unhandled exceptions or internal details of the web application, which attackers can exploit to gain unauthorized access or further map the system's internals.
detection_pattern: EGRESS node emitting shell error output that reaches an external user without passing through a TRANSFORM node that sanitizes or replaces error details. Look for EXTERNAL (shell/command execution) flowing to EGRESS without error-masking TRANSFORM.
